---

CookTrace is tested against a small set of devices, so reports from any other wearable, smart scale, or Health Connect setup are extremely valuable for spotting integration-specific quirks.

<!-- e.g.
  - Garmin Forerunner 265
  - Fitbit Charge 6
  - Withings ScanWatch / Body+ / Body Pro
  - Health Connect on Galaxy Watch 6 / Mi Band 8 / etc.
-->
